scenes.text:
Every problem in business can be
traced back to a communication failure.

Eighty-six percent of workplace failures are caused by poor communication. Not lack of talent. Not lack of resources. Communication. Leaders
who communicate clearly, frequently, and honestly build teams that can survive anything. Silence from leadership breeds anxiety, rumors, and distrust.

Overcommunicate the why behind every decision. People do not resist change. They resist change
they do not understand. When they know the reason, they join the mission.

Clear communication is not a soft skill. It is
the hardest and most important skill of leadership.

What is your biggest communication lesson?
Share below. Follow for leadership skills.
